response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior full-stack engineer with roughly 15 years of experience, strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, open source), and some genuinely high-scale work (low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic). However, the role is a Principal/IC6 position centered on experimentation and growth measurement platforms, and the resume shows no experience with experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, statistical analysis, or growth engineering. There is also no evidence of principal-level scope: no multi-team initiatives led, no platform adopted across teams, and career progression has stayed at senior/staff IC on small product teams. The AI-agent tooling work at re:cinq aligns with the 'AI tools' preference, but that alone does not offset the missing core domain.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems
High-scale, low-latency distributed systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong engineering craft: TDD, CI/CD, open-source authorship, teaching and workshops
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth measurement platform experience
No demonstrated principal-level scope leading multi-team, cross-product initiatives
Limited evidence of data/statistical analysis and telemetry infrastructure work required by the role

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering fundamentals at scale
